name: Accsoon SeeMo iOS/HDMI Smartphone Adapter
description: Why strain your eyes, relying on a tiny camera display to compose your shot, when you can use this black SeeMo iOS/HDMI Smartphone Adapter from Accsoon.

features.Key Features:: Use Your iPhone as a Camera Monitor | Powered by an Optional Sony NP-F Battery | Record H.264/30p Video to Your iPhone | Live Stream Full HD Footage at 60 fps | Top Cold Shoe for Optional Accessory | 5V/2A USB-C Output to Phone or Accessory | HDMI Input from Camera | USB-C & USB-C/Lightning Cables | Bottom 1/4"-20 Connection | 1/4"-20 to Cold Shoe Adapter
